Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0400 "YIEARKUNGFU-4380-0400" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $4380 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Yie Ar Kung-Fu.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $4380 to setup the port A data direction register ($DC02) to allow the game to run properly. Also removed the disk drive protection check which caused the game to crash if a drive was detected by replacing the BMI $051C instruction ($30, $EC) at $052E with RTS, NOP ($60, $EA).
